introSection: Family Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Didi'Land in Morsbronn-les-Bains, Grand Est, France. It was built by SBF Visa Group in Italy during January 2014.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Family Coaster on the park's website (In French)

fullText:
Family Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Didi'Land in Morsbronn-les-Bains, Grand Est, France. It was built by SBF Visa Group in Italy during January 2014.

Yellow track and white supports.




 * Family Coaster on the park's website (In French)
